since_last: 89% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.19%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 89% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.65% · BTC +0.99% · Gold +2.75% · Nasdaq100 +3.06%. 89% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.19%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.19%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at +19.60%
cards.body: Leaders: SPCX +19.60%, MU +10.84%, MRVL +10.43%, SNAP +8.56%, ARM +8.33%. Laggards: IBM -1.30%, INOD -1.23%, WDAY -0.92%, CRM -0.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +19.60% at $192.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +19.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
